assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 11-13 show the query: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. This matches the assertion exactly.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md evaluates all 3 candidates: TC-9020 has TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 has TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 has no Depend links. Each issue's issuelinks were inspected for link type 'Depend' and linked Task statuses were fetched.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 45 lists TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. ready-for-qa.md line 40 states 'Result: QUALIFIED — Ready for QA' with both tasks shown as completed.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 51: 'TC-9023 (CVE-2026-39102): Remediation still in progress -- TC-9025 is In Progress.' ready-for-qa.md line 58: 'Result: EXCLUDED — Remediation in progress' and line 60: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 52: 'TC-9026 (CVE-2026-39330): No linked remediation tasks (no Depend links).' ready-for-qa.md line 72: 'Linked remediation Tasks (Depend): None' and line 74: 'Result: EXCLUDED — No remediation tasks to verify.'

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 43-45 show a table with a 'Remediation Tasks' column header, populated with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' for TC-9020.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 47: 'Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md line 90: 'TC-9020: Consider transitioning to ON_QA — all remediation is complete.' TC-9020 is the only Ready for QA issue.
